# IGET Vapes Original — Australia's #1 Trusted Online Vape Shop

> Buy genuine IGET vapes, Alibarbar vapes & premium disposable vapes online in Australia. 150+ flavours, fast Australia-wide delivery, and unbeatable prices. Shop from $30 per device.

## About IGET Vapes Original

IGET Vapes Original (igetvapeshub.com) is Australia's most trusted online vape store, specialising in 100% genuine disposable vapes from leading brands including IGET and Alibarbar. We offer over 150 premium vape flavours across 7 product categories with fast delivery to all Australian states and territories including Sydney, Melbourne, Brisbane, Perth, Adelaide, Canberra, Hobart, and Darwin.

## Products

### IGET Vapes

- [JNR Cruiser 12000 Puffs](https://igetvapeshub.com/products/jnr-cruiser): $65 — 25ml capacity, 3500mAh rechargeable battery, dual mesh coil, 18 flavours. Australia's most powerful disposable vape.
- [IGET One 12000 Puffs](https://igetvapeshub.com/products/iget-one): $55 — 18ml capacity, 2700mAh battery, dual mesh coil. Sleek design with premium flavours.
- [IGET Bar Pro 10000 Puffs](https://igetvapeshub.com/products/iget-bar-pro): $48 — 20ml capacity, 2000mAh battery, 26 flavours. Australia's most popular disposable vape.
- [IGET Bar Plus S3 10000 Puffs](https://igetvapeshub.com/products/iget-bar-plus-s3): $48 — Refillable pod system, 950mAh battery, swap pods for different flavours.
- [S3 Replacement Pods](https://igetvapeshub.com/products/iget-bar-plus-s3-pod): $30 — 18ml pre-filled pods for the IGET S3 system, 10,000 puffs per pod.

### Alibarbar Vapes

- [Alibarbar Ingot 9000 Puffs](https://igetvapeshub.com/products/alibarbar-ingot): $45 — Compact design, 18ml capacity, rich flavour profiles.
- [Alibarbar Ice Adjust 12000 Puffs](https://igetvapeshub.com/products/alibarbar-ice-adjust): $50 — Adjustable ice intensity, 20ml capacity, 12,000 puffs.

### Mix & Match Deals

- [Mix & Match Bundle Deals](https://igetvapeshub.com/mix-and-match): Save up to 15% when you buy 3, 5, or 10+ devices. Mix any flavours across all product ranges.

- **Minimum Order**: $250 AUD

## Popular Flavours

Top-selling flavours across all categories include: Strawberry Watermelon Ice, Blueberry Raspberry Ice, Grape Ice, Cool Mint, Cherry Pomegranate, Passion Fruit Kiwi Guava, Orange Fanta Soda, Watermelon Ice, Mango Ice, and Blueberry Ice.

## Delivery Coverage

We deliver to all Australian states and territories: New South Wales (Sydney, Newcastle, Wollongong), Victoria (Melbourne, Geelong, Ballarat), Queensland (Brisbane, Gold Coast, Sunshine Coast, Cairns), South Australia (Adelaide), Western Australia (Perth), Tasmania (Hobart, Launceston), Northern Territory (Darwin, Alice Springs), and ACT (Canberra).
